findings.title: return_pattern: 2 variants in src/myapp/models/
findings.description:
2 return_pattern variants in src/myapp/models/ (1/2 use canonical pattern).
  - src/myapp/models/core.py:25 (Product.find_by_sku)
findings.fix: Consolidate to the dominant pattern (1x, exemplar: src/myapp/models/core.py:11). Deviations: src/myapp/models/core.py:25 (Product.find_by_sku).

metadata.deliberate_pattern_risk: May reflect architecture transition or deliberate variation. Review whether variants serve distinct purposes.
